allow: Bash(PRISMA_FORCE_TRANSACTIONS=1 npx prisma migrate dev --name remove-item-status --create-only)

Bash(mv date-picker.tsx location-input.tsx photo-thumbnail.tsx upload-photo.tsx currency-selector.tsx converted-amount.tsx auto-refresh.tsx user-menu.tsx theme-toggle.tsx tutorial-button.tsx ui/)

Bash(mv expense-list.tsx expense-card.tsx expense-drawer.tsx expense-settlement-panel.tsx expense-stats-card.tsx expense-summary.tsx my-settlement-banner.tsx create-expense-form.tsx edit-expense-form.tsx delete-expense-button.tsx create-payment-form.tsx receipt-ai-button.tsx receipt-button.tsx "../modules/expenses/components/")
